title: rudgea panamensis
intro: Rudgea panamensis, also known as Panama tree or Panama tree wood, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rudgea panamensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Rudgea panamensis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, often used to treat various health conditions.
